description: Default capability set for Bedrock Chat desktop client. Deny-by-default with explicit grants.

permissions.description: WHY: Enables custom drag regions for frameless window mode (future). Required for window repositioning via drag.
WHY: Allows updating the window title dynamically (e.g., showing current channel name).
WHY: Allows programmatic minimize when clicking tray icon to hide window.
WHY: Allows programmatic maximize/restore for window management.
WHY: Allows programmatic close to support tray-based hide-on-close behavior.
WHY: Allows showing the window from tray icon and after DOM-ready to prevent FOUC.
WHY: Allows hiding the window to system tray instead of quitting.
WHY: Prompts user for notification permission on first launch. Required for message/call notifications.
WHY: Sends native OS notifications for incoming messages, calls, and family alerts.
WHY: Opens URLs in the default browser. Required for OAuth login flows (Supabase auth redirects) and external links in chat messages.
